title: Staff Engineer, Payments Platform
description: Pennylane is hiring a Staff Engineer to lead the payments platform team. You will own the architecture of the payment-collection rail (SEPA + cards), partner with product and finance leads to scope new payment products, and mentor a team of 6 engineers. Series C company, ~400 employees, ~25 engineers on the platform side. The role is hands-on: ~50% coding, ~30% architecture and design reviews, ~20% mentorship and hiring.

requirements.text: Strong distributed-systems background — event-driven architectures, queueing, idempotency
Experience leading or co-leading a team of mid-to-senior engineers
Direct experience with payment platforms (cards, SEPA, ACH, or similar)
Comfortable with on-call ownership for a critical financial system
Experience with Ruby/Rails (we run a Rails monolith with Go services on the side)
